description: A structured report format for reviewing Ai stacks.

report.title: Stackfax Report: Example Stack

verdict.summary: Strong starter stack. Biggest risk is using expensive models for routine work or automating business actions without approval gates.

stack_summary.summary: A cloud-first Ai stack for business automation with model routing and approval gates.

current_stack.human_review: Required before customer-facing or business-critical actions.

token_burn_risk.notes: Premium models may be used for routine summaries, drafting, classification, or repeated agent loops.

privacy_risk.notes: Business and customer data may require stronger data boundaries before automation expands.

automation_risk.notes: The stack should stay draft-only until approval gates and run receipts are in place.

hardware_overbuild_risk.notes: Local hardware is not required until the workload proves a local hosting need.

subscription_overlap_risk.notes: Paid tools should each have a clear job before adding more subscriptions.

workflow_fit.notes: The workflow is useful but should be narrowed into repeatable steps before deeper automation.
workflow_fit.recommended_first_workflow: Observe, summarize, draft, and ask for approval.

recommended_layers.name: Cheap Daily Driver Layer
recommended_layers.purpose: Routine summaries, drafts, classification, cleanup, and low-risk research.

recommended_layers.name: Strong Reasoning Layer
recommended_layers.purpose: Strategy, complex research synthesis, sales analysis, and workflow design.

recommended_layers.name: Human Approval Layer
recommended_layers.purpose: Review before actions touching customers, money, inventory, credentials, or production systems.

recommended_layers.name: Run Receipt Layer
recommended_layers.purpose: Record what happened, which tools/models were used, what changed, what failed, and what needs review.

hardware_verdict.reason: Cloud tools are enough until the user proves the workflow and has a justified local hosting need.

recommended_pattern: Code or tools gather and filter.
Strong model reviews, reasons, or decides.

agent_roi.notes: The stack should prove useful completed work, not just activity.

report.best_first_upgrade: Add model routing, approval gates, and run receipts before adding more automations.

next_test.name: Safe Starter Workflow Test
next_test.description: Run one low-risk workflow that observes, summarizes, drafts, and asks for approval before touching customer data, credentials, or production systems.

track: whether the stack produced useful work

report.final_verdict: Strong starter stack. Keep it cloud-first for now, route models by job, require human approval for business actions, and add run receipts before expanding automation.
